name: Rudolph Pickleball Complex
description: Rudolph Pickleball Complex is a place to play pickleball in Murray, KY. There are 5 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights, trainers or lessons, youth programming, and restrooms.
open_play_schedule:
Advanced Play Monday nights
Beginner/Intermediate Play Thursday nights
